title: CE Bolt-Through Tubular Latch - 64mm / 2.5 inch Back Set - Polished Nickel
availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Mortice Latch: CE Bolt Through Tubular Latch suitable for internal doors with no locking requirements.
Guided latch bolt for a smooth action
description: From the manufacturer Soft edge latch bolt - prevents snags This latch bolt has rounded edges to help prevent catching on arms, bags and clothes. Soft edges to prevent catching Guided escaoped bolt for a smooth action Reinforced and solid to improve security Flush sunk follower - easy fitting The follower (where the spindle goes through) on this latch is flush with the latch body to prevent snags within the door. Helpful profile to aid in fitting and reduce mechancial issues Slim body - helps with retro-fit Both the 2 1/2 & 3 inch backset vairant come in a slim 21mm case to help with retro-fitting into larger latch bolt mortices. Retro-fits most configurations Slim profile to reduce morticing 2 backset sizes CE Accredited Latch - quality assured. Tested to British Standard EN 1634 to ensure long lasting performance. Also can be used on FD 30 & 60 Wooden Fire Doors (with intumescent). CE Marked FD 30 & 60 approved Tested for 10,000s cycles.
